info.name: Get listings of a collection

params.name: symbol
params.description: collection symbol

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip, default 0, min 0

params.name: limit
params.description: The numbers of items to return, default 20, min 1, max 100

params.name: min_price
params.description: Filter listings that are less than this price

params.name: max_price
params.description: Filter listings that are more than this price

params.name: attributes
params.description: Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return listings that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".

params.name: sort
params.description: The field to sort the listings, default 'listPrice'

params.name: listingAggMode
params.description: True to return aggregated marketplace listings, false to return just Magic Eden listings.

params.name: sort_direction
params.description: The direction returned elements should be sorted in, default 'asc'

params.name: paymentMints
params.description: Filter listings by the payment mint address that the seller expects. Default to filter for listings that only accept native SOL. Use "ALL" to show all listings.

items.docs: Get listings of a collection

info.name: Get stats of a collection

params.name: symbol
params.description: collection symbol

params.name: timeWindow
params.description: Time window for stats, default all. '24h', '7d', '30d', 'all'

params.name: listingAggMode
params.description: True to return aggregated marketplace listings, false to return just Magic Eden listings. Defaults to false.

items.docs: Get stats of a collection

info.name: Get batch listings of a collection

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip, default 0, min 0

params.name: limit
params.description: The numbers of items to return, default 20, min 1, max 100

params.name: min_price
params.description: Filter listings that are less than this price

params.name: max_price
params.description: Filter listings that are more than this price

params.name: attributes
params.description: Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return listings that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".

params.name: sort
params.description: The field to sort the listings, default 'listPrice'

params.name: sort_direction
params.description: The direction returned elements should be sorted in, default 'asc'

params.name: listingAggMode
params.description: True to return aggregated marketplace listings, false to return just Magic Eden listings.

params.description: Price in SOL

params.name: buyerReferral
params.description: Buyer referral wallet

params.name: expiry
params.description: timestamp in seconds in the future, 0 will default to 7 days.

info.name: mmm
Get instruction to create a pool

params.name: spotPrice
params.description: Pool initial spot price in SOL

params.name: curveType
params.description: Type curve, either 'linear' or 'exp'

params.name: curveDelta
params.description: Curve delta used to change price after a fill

params.name: reinvestBuy
params.description: Whether to reinvest bought asset or transfer directly to owner

params.name: reinvestSell
params.description: Whether to reinvest payment from sale or transfer directly to owner

params.name: expiry
params.description: Timestamp in seconds in the future, 0 means no expiry

params.name: lpFeeBp
params.description: Requested liquidity provider fee in basis points

params.name: buysideCreatorRoyaltyBp
params.description: Amount of creator royalty the pool should pay in basis points

params.name: paymentMint
params.description: Mint address of payment (default for SOL)

params.name: collectionSymbol
params.description: Collection symbol for which the pool will be valid

params.name: owner
params.description: Owner of the pool

params.name: solDeposit
params.description: Optional sol amount to deposit with pool creation

params.name: priorityFee
params.description: Priority fee (in microlamports) to reprioritize the transaction against others

params.name: sharedEscrowCount
params.description: Number of pools (bids) that will share the escrow account

info.name: Get instruction to update an existing pool

params.name: pool
params.description: Public key of pool to modify

params.name: spotPrice
params.description: Pool initial spot price in SOL

params.name: curveType
params.description: Type curve, either 'linear' or 'exp'

params.name: curveDelta
params.description: Curve delta used to change price after a fill

params.name: reinvestBuy
params.description: Whether to reinvest bought asset or transfer directly to owner (this value must remain unchanged from when the pool was created)

params.name: reinvestSell
params.description: Whether to reinvest payment from sale or transfer directly to owner (this value must remain unchanged from when the pool was created)

params.name: expiry
params.description: Timestamp in seconds in the future, 0 means no expiry

params.name: lpFeeBp
params.description: Requested liquidity provider fee in basis points

params.name: buysideCreatorRoyaltyBp
params.description: Amount of creator royalty the pool should pay in basis points

params.name: priorityFee
params.description: Priority fee (in microlamports) to reprioritize the transaction against others

params.name: sharedEscrowCount
params.description: Number of pools (bids) that will share the escrow account

info.name: Get AMM pools corresponding to an owner or collection symbol. At least one of required collectionSymbol or owner is required!

params.name: collectionSymbol
params.description: The collection symbol to query the pools from. At least this or "owner" must be passed in

params.name: pools
params.description: The pools key to query by.

params.name: owner
params.description: The owner public key to query the pools created by. At least this or "collectionSymbol" must be passed in

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip, default 0, min 0

params.name: limit
params.description: The numbers of items to return, default 100, min 1, max 500

params.name: field
params.description: Sort pools by field. 0: NONE (no sorting field, default), 1: ADDRESS (sort pools by pool address), 2: SPOT_PRICE (sort pools by pool spot price), 5: BUYSIDE_ADJUSTED_PRICE (sort pools by buyside_adjusted_price = spot_price - royalty_fee - lp_fee)

params.name: direction
params.description: Sort pools by field in specified directions. 0: NONE (no sorting direction, default to increasing order if field is specified), 1: DESC (descending), 2: INC (increasing)

items.docs: Get AMM pools corresponding to an owner or collection symbol. At least one of required collectionSymbol or owner is required!

params.description: wallet address.

params.name: collection_symbol
params.description: Filter tokens that are part of this collection symbol, max length of 255 characters

params.name: mcc_address
params.description: Filter tokens that are part of this Metaplex Certified Collection address, max length of 48 characters

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip, default 0, min 0

params.name: limit
params.description: The numbers of items to return, default 100, min 1, max 500

params.name: min_price
params.description: Filter listings that are less than this price

params.name: max_price
params.description: Filter listings that are more than this price

params.name: attributes
params.description: Represents a filtering mechanism where the elements within each inner array are logically ORed, and the resulting arrays are ANDed together at the top level. Each inner array consists of objects with two properties: traitType (a string) and value (a string). For example: [[{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value1"},{"traitType":"trait1", "value":"value2"}]] would return tokens that have "value1" OR "value2" for "trait1".

params.name: listStatus
params.description: Determines what type of tokens to return, default both

params.name: sort
params.description: The field to sort the tokens, default 'updatedAt'

params.name: sort_direction
params.description: The direction returned elements should be sorted in, default 'desc'

items.docs: Get tokens owned by a wallet.
